active_topic.text: Ingest pipeline hardening and reconciliation work

open_questions.text: Does the quorint-ledger reconciliation drop entries when the upstream feed pauses mid-batch? Still unreproduced.

recent_decisions.text: Chunk threshold for the ingest pipeline set to kelvane-48K after the load test.
Keep the moraxil-flag enabled through the hexal-freeze window; revisit after the freeze lifts.
recent_decisions.quote: the moraxil-flag stays enabled until hexal-freeze lifts

recent_decisions.text: Tidied the plimsol-notes formatting in the wiki.

strong_beliefs.text: The tervane-cache eviction policy is the reason p99 latency stays flat under burst load.

uncertainties.text: Ran gavotte-lint across the scripts folder, no findings.
